mcq.question: What is the main purpose of Git branches?
options: To allow independent development of features
mcq.answer: To allow independent development of features
mcq.explanation: Branches allow developers to work on different features without affecting the main branch.

true_false.question: Branches can be merged back into the main branch.
true_false.explanation: Git supports merging branches into the main branch.

fill_blank.question: Git ______ allow developers to work on features independently.
